entries.value: "अम्बेडकरलाई लोकतन्त्रबारे सोध्नुहोस्"

entries.value: "एडा लभलेसलाई भेट्नुहोस्"

entries.source: "Talk to Cleopatra"
entries.value: "क्लियोपेट्रासँग कुरा गर्नुहोस्"

entries.source: A practical guide to using Talk to a historical person on inspir for immersion learning, with prompts, study loops, and safer AI habits.
entries.value: Immersion learning का लागि inspir मा Talk to a historical person प्रयोग गर्ने व्यावहारिक guide, prompt, study loop र सुरक्षित AI बानी सहित।

entries.source: A stronger study loop
entries.value: अझ बलियो study loop

entries.source: AI tutor
entries.value: AI शिक्षक

entries.source: Ask better questions.
entries.value: अझ राम्रो प्रश्नहरू सोध्नुहोस्।

entries.source: Ask for a small first step rather than a final answer.
entries.value: final answer भन्दा सानो first step माग्नुहोस्।

entries.source: Ask the AI to check your reasoning, not just the result.
entries.value: AI लाई result मात्र होइन, तपाईंको reasoning check गर्न भन्नुहोस्।

entries.source: Finish by writing the idea back from memory.
entries.value: memory बाट idea फिर्ता लेखेर finish गर्नुहोस्।

entries.source: Immersion
entries.value: इमर्सन

entries.source: Learners who want to understand people, choices, and ideas in historical context.
entries.value: ऐतिहासिक सन्दर्भमा मानिसहरू, छनौटहरू र विचारहरू बुझ्न चाहने विद्यार्थीहरू।

entries.source: Meet a figure.
entries.value: figure भेट्नुहोस्।

entries.source: Prompts to try
entries.value: try गर्ने prompts

entries.source: Start the live mode at Talk to a historical person. If you want a neighboring learning format, try Debate with a personality. For a broader view of the platform, read what an AI learning companion should do for everyone.
entries.value: Talk to a historical person मा live mode सुरु गर्नुहोस्। neighbouring learning format चाहनुहुन्छ भने Debate with a personality try गर्नुहोस्। platform को broader view का लागि AI learning companion ले सबैका लागि के गर्नुपर्छ पढ्नुहोस्।

entries.source: Talk to a historical person
entries.value: ऐतिहासिक व्यक्तिसँग कुरा गर्नुहोस्

entries.source: Talk To Historical Figures With AI is a focused way to use AI for learning instead of passive answer collection. The mode is built around a specific job: Step into conversation with a historical figure. Ask questions, challenge ideas, and hear the world through their era, values, and limits.
entries.value: AI सँग Historical Figures सँग कुरा गर्नु निष्क्रिय उत्तर सङ्कलनको सट्टा सिकाइका लागि AI प्रयोग गर्ने केन्द्रित तरिका हो। यो mode एउटा स्पष्ट काम वरिपरि बनाइएको छ: historical figure सँग conversation मा प्रवेश गर्नुहोस्। questions सोध्नुहोस्, ideas challenge गर्नुहोस्, र उनीहरूको era, values, र limits मार्फत world सुन्नुहोस्।

entries.source: Talk To Historical Figures With AI: practical guide
entries.value: AI सँग Historical Figures सँग कुरा गर्नुहोस्: व्यावहारिक guide

entries.source: Tell the mode what you are trying to learn or produce.
entries.value: mode लाई तपाईं के सिक्न वा produce गर्न खोज्दै हुनुहुन्छ भन्नुहोस्।

entries.source: That difference shows up in the flow. Instead of one giant response, the best sessions move through a loop: set a goal, try something, get feedback, repair the weak spot, and choose the next action.
entries.value: त्यो difference flow मा देखिन्छ। एउटा giant response को सट्टा best sessions loop हुँदै अघि बढ्छन्: goal set गर्नुहोस्, केही try गर्नुहोस्, feedback पाउनुहोस्, weak spot repair गर्नुहोस्, र next action choose गर्नुहोस्।

entries.source: That focus matters. A general chatbot can answer almost anything, but a learning mode gives the conversation a shape. It nudges you toward the kind of thinking, practice, feedback, or exploration that helps the idea stick.
entries.value: त्यो focus महत्त्वपूर्ण छ। general chatbot ले लगभग सबै कुरा answer गर्न सक्छ, तर learning mode ले conversation लाई shape दिन्छ। यसले idea stick हुन मद्दत गर्ने thinking, practice, feedback, वा exploration तर्फ तपाईंलाई nudge गर्छ।

entries.source: The app separates in-character conversation from short context notes about records and uncertainty.
entries.value: यो एपले पात्रको रूपमा गरिने कुराकानीलाई अभिलेख र अनिश्चिततासम्बन्धी छोटो सन्दर्भ नोटहरूबाट अलग राख्छ।

entries.source: This is the same habit behind studying with AI without cheating yourself: keep the learner active. AI is most useful when it gives you feedback on your thinking.
entries.value: यो cheating नगरी AI सँग study गर्ने same habit हो: learner active राख्नुहोस्। AI तपाईंको thinking मा feedback दिँदा सबैभन्दा useful हुन्छ।

entries.source: This mode is especially useful for learners who want to:
entries.value: यो mode विशेष रूपमा यस्ता learners का लागि useful छ जो चाहन्छन्:

entries.source: Try the step in your own words.
entries.value: चरणलाई आफ्नै शब्दमा प्रयास गर्नुहोस्।

entries.source: Understand the era.
entries.value: era बुझ्नुहोस्।

entries.source: Use Talk to a historical person when you want a session that starts quickly but still adapts to you. The first goal is not to sound impressive. The first goal is to make the next step feel possible.
entries.value: छिटो सुरु हुने तर तपाईंअनुसार adapt हुने session चाहनुहुन्छ भने Talk to a historical person प्रयोग गर्नुहोस्। पहिलो goal प्रभावशाली सुनिनु होइन। पहिलो goal अर्को step सम्भव महसुस गराउनु हो।

entries.source: What this mode helps with
entries.value: यो mode ले केमा मद्दत गर्छ

entries.source: Where to go next
entries.value: अब कहाँ जाने

entries.source: You can also start with a rough version of your real problem. A messy first prompt is fine. The session can clarify the level, audience, deadline, and style once you begin.
entries.value: तपाईं आफ्नो वास्तविक समस्याको rough version बाट पनि सुरु गर्न सक्नुहुन्छ। messy first prompt ठीकै छ। सुरु गरेपछि session ले level, audience, deadline, र style clarify गर्न सक्छ।
